home-summary: I am a Software Engineering student with an academic background in Computer Science and experience in systems, support, and technical operations.
contato-descricao: Feel free to reach out or send me a message
contato-resumo:
I’m interested in freelance opportunities. However,
 if you have other request or question, don’t 
 hesitate to contact me
about-paragraph-1: I am a Software Engineering student with an academic background in Computer Science, where I completed four semesters.
about-paragraph-2: During my studies, I completed an internship in Systems Analysis and Development, which gave me a solid foundation in programming and in understanding complex systems. I am always looking to improve my technical skills and contribute to innovative projects that combine technology and efficiency.

smallprojects.project-1-description: Bot to automate messages on Whatsapp using the Baileys library.
smallprojects.project-2-description: Random password generator with customization options.
smallprojects.project-3-description: Application to convert values between different currencies using an exchange API.
smallprojects.project-4-description: Application to manage daily tasks with features to add, edit and delete.
